professional_experience.title: Professional Services (Cloud Consultant) - DevOps/MLOps
professional_experience.summary: Assisting enterprise customers in designing, migrating, implementing, and building scalable solutions on AWS with infrastructure automation and MLOps.

description.1: Developed Terraform modules for ~10 AWS services with comprehensive testing frameworks (tftest, PyTest), delivering a production-ready solution that enabled 38+ AWS services for application teams.
description.2: Architected security solutions implementing 1000+ preventative controls aligned with CCMv4.0 compliance requirements, designing self-service capabilities with governance guardrails.
description.3: Delivered POCs showcasing use-cases of various AWS services through Terraform, and implemented evidence and federated architecture patterns.
description.4: Collaborated across Landing Zone, Compliance, Security, and Migrations workstreams, facilitating knowledge transfer sessions. Received 3 Pulse ratings of 5/5 and 10/10 CSAT score.

description.1: Refactored and created critical Terraform infrastructure code to enhance security and scalability, solving complex legacy modernization challenges in financial services.
description.2: Leveraged Amazon Q AI capabilities to accelerate development workflows, code analysis, and migration assessments, transforming infrastructure patterns to align with cloud-native principles.
description.3: Partnered with DTCC engineering teams on secure infrastructure practices and knowledge transfer.

projects.name: Medical Image Classification MLOps Pipeline (Internal - SME Program)

description.1: Architected end-to-end MLOps pipeline on SageMaker, automating data processing, multi-model training, and ensemble model creation for medical image classification.
description.2: Deployed production SageMaker endpoints with blue-green deployment, auto-scaling, and drift detection -- enabling zero-downtime model updates with automatic rollback.
description.3: Provisioned entire infrastructure with Terraform and built CI/CD via CodePipeline and CodeBuild, deploying CloudFront frontend and API Gateway + Lambda inference API.

description.1: Leading greenfield cloud migration -- designing AWS Organizations OU structure, SCPs, tag policies, and deploying Terraform infrastructure with GitHub Actions CI/CD across multi-account environments.
description.2: Delivering architectural recommendations on cost optimization, HA, and DR to customer stakeholders, defining migration roadmap for 50+ application workloads.

internal_contributions.title: Tech Talk: Automating Unit Testing for Terraform using Terraform Test and PyTest frameworks
Tech Talk: GitOps Configuration Safety with Health Checks and Pipeline Gating
APG Pattern: Secure PR Previews and Approval-Gated Releases for Amplify Gen 2 with GitHub (Published)

professional_experience.title: Associate Professional Services - DevOps
professional_experience.summary: Underwent extensive hands-on DevOps and Cloud training, delivered multiple proof-of-concepts, and contributed to a production ECS migration project using Terraform and CI/CD pipelines.

description.1: Migrated on-premises web application to AWS ECS, implementing high-availability architecture and CI/CD pipeline using AWS CodePipeline, reducing maintenance overhead.
description.2: Architected infrastructure as code using Terraform, managing AWS resources including VPC, ALB, and ECS clusters while implementing blue-green deployment strategy for zero-downtime updates.
description.3: Automated Docker image building and deployment process through integration of AWS CodeBuild, CodeDeploy, and Amazon ECR, streamlining application delivery workflow.
description.4: Established comprehensive monitoring solution using AWS X-Ray and CloudWatch for distributed tracing and full observability of application performance.

professional_experience.title: Software Developer Associate
professional_experience.summary: Containerized and deployed production applications on AWS, building CI/CD pipelines and establishing code quality infrastructure.

description.1: Containerized application with Docker and deployed to AWS using ECR and ECS services.
description.2: Implemented comprehensive CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions, automating linting, testing, building, and deployment processes.
description.3: Standardized codebase with multi-language linting (pylint, flake8, Black, ESLint, Stylelint) and unit testing (Pytest, Jest).
description.4: Deployed SonarQube on AWS EC2 with RDS integration for continuous code quality analysis.
description.5: Provisioned Forem platform using Ansible for streamlined infrastructure automation.
